== 3...Nxe5 - Irish Gambit Accepted ==

Black captures the free knight and gains a big material advantage. However, they might still get caught by surprise if they do not focus or play too passively.

'''1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Nxe5 Nxe5'''
